name: Hearthbound Horizons
summary: A polished Fabric 1.20.1 cozy exploration survival pack focused on scenic worlds, atmospheric travel, farming, cooking, beautiful building, village improvement, storage progression, and long-term settlement projects without tech bloat or hardcore pressure.

mods.reason_selected: performance_foundation renderer performance for scenic terrain and decorated builds
performance_foundation broad gameplay and server optimization
performance_foundation memory reduction for long survival worlds
performance_foundation startup, memory, and stability fixes
performance_foundation client rendering speedups
performance_foundation reduce hidden entity rendering cost
performance_foundation Sodium compatibility for Fabric rendering API content
client_qol mod configuration discovery
client_qol readable block and entity information

client_qol food value clarity for cooking progression
inventory_management smoother inventory interactions
inventory_management container visibility while traveling
inventory_management sorting and restocking quality of life
worldgen beautiful vanilla-style terrain without stacking multiple full biome overhauls
villages improved settlements that feel worth visiting and renovating
light_exploration small discoveries and ruins without boss-heavy adventure bloat
structures vanilla-style structure variety for relaxed journeys
animals immersive wildlife that makes the overworld feel alive
visual_polish gentle particles and ambient detail
atmosphere relaxing biome ambience and immersive soundscape
soundscape spatial audio for caves, homes, forests, and villages
soundscape grounded travel and building ambience
building_blocks large palette for homes, workshops, barns, docks, and village streets
building_blocks decorative variants for long-term build projects
decoration functional cozy details that support lived-in spaces

building_blocks cozy home and workshop detailing
building_blocks cottage, barn, dock, and village roof shapes
building_blocks farms, gardens, pastures, and settlement boundaries
farming cooking core kitchen and homestead progression
farming cooking extra food goals integrated with Farmer's Delight style play
storage_solution mobile storage for scenic expeditions
storage_solution simple base storage progression without factory bloat
map_tools gentle navigation for exploration and settlement planning
map_tools long-term world memory and route planning
light_exploration biome finding for beautiful build sites without full quest bloat
waypoints_or_fast_travel optional travel between homes, villages, and scenic outposts
backpack_travel_systems sleeping bags for long journeys without resetting spawn

notes: Curated to stay cozy and stable: no large tech suite, no gun/chaos path, no hardcore survival realism, no duplicate full worldgen stack. Human taste review should focus on whether Xaero maps feel too revealing and whether Waystones should be recipe-gated for slower travel progression.
